Pricing.title: Choose your plan
Pricing.description: Publish your menu online and share it via QR code.

hero.title: Your menu, online. Updated in real time. One QR scan away.
hero.subtitle: Build your digital menu in under 10 minutes — no technical skills required. Your guests scan, you edit live, your menu is never out of date.
hero.microTrust: No credit card · 10-minute setup · Cancel anytime

audience.title: Cartora adapts to your type of establishment
audience.subtitle: Restaurant, pizzeria, brasserie, bar, café, creperie, fast food, bakery — eight ready-to-use profiles with pre-filled categories.
audience.footnote: Pick your type at signup: Cartora pre-fills the matching categories (starters/mains/desserts for a traditional restaurant, pizzas/pasta/antipasti for a pizzeria, etc.).

ardoise.title: A chalkboard wiped at every service
ardoise.body: Tuesday's daily special is still showing on Thursday. One rain shower, one sponge swipe, and half your offer is gone.

pdf.title: A PDF printed six months ago
pdf.body: Prices have changed, two dishes are off the menu, but the corner copy shop keeps printing the same version.

wix.title: A website only your agency can update
wix.body: Every menu change costs €80 to your agency. After three months, you stop bothering.

allergens.title: A menu without allergens
allergens.body: EU Regulation 1169/2011 has required them since 2014. On paper, you improvise out loud — at every single service.

howItWorks.title: Three steps, your menu is online

step1.title: Create your free account
step1.body: Email, password, that's it — no credit card needed. You're in the editor in under a minute.

step2.title: Fill in your menu
step2.body: Dishes, categories, allergens, photos: the editor works without any training. A full menu takes about 10 minutes.

step3.title: Print your QR code
step3.body: Customers scan it. Every price or dish edit goes live to the second — with no reprint needed.

features.title: Everything you need to serve your menu online

editor.title: Editor with no learning curve
editor.body: Dishes, categories, allergens, prices: fill your menu without a tutorial. Edits go live to the second.

qr.title: QR code with analytics
qr.body: One QR per restaurant, to print on tables or in the window. Track scans (time, device, source) from your dashboard.

allergens.title: 14 EU allergens and photos
allergens.body: The 14 allergens from EU regulation 1169/2011, built into every dish. Photos available based on your plan (5 / 20 / unlimited).

bilingual.title: French-English bilingual
bilingual.body: Each dish entered in both languages. Your guest sees their own automatically, based on their browser.

daily.title: Daily specials and set menus
daily.body: Time-limited daily dishes (up to 14 days) and set menus with detailed descriptions. Auto-removed on expiry.

branding.title: Premium templates and brand colors
branding.body: Seven templates to choose from — two base (Classic, Cartora) and five premium designs. Customizable colors on Classic, with a WCAG AA contrast check to stay legible.

demo.title: Here's what a published Cartora menu looks like.
demo.subtitle: Click to open a real live menu in a new tab. You can test the navigation, bilingual switch, allergens and QR flow.
demo.imageAlt: Desktop preview of a published Cartora menu, with starters, mains and today's specials.
demo.footnote: This demo is a real Cartora menu, built in 8 minutes.

comparison.title: How Cartora compares
comparison.subtitle: Three concrete cases depending on what you use today for your menu.

paper.label: If you still use a paper menu
paper.body: Paper has a tangible charm and never crashes. But every price or dish change means reprinting, allergens stay handled by hand (with the legal risk that comes with it), and the menu ages fast. Cartora keeps the menu accurate without a single reprint.

website.label: If you already have a website
website.body: Your website still earns its place for general info: address, opening hours, ambient photos. But a website isn't built for a menu that moves: every change goes through edit mode, allergens aren't structured, and per-dish bilingual is rarely native. Cartora slots in alongside, it doesn't replace your site.

other.label: If you're comparing other digital menus
other.body: Other tools exist and some do their job very well. What drives Cartora: built in France, EU hosting, 14 native EU allergens, per-dish bilingual, and no commitment. Up to you to compare what matters for your venue.

pricing.title: Fair pricing, no surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Start for free. Pay only when you publish.
pricing.footer: No commitment · Cancel in 1 click · VAT included

hostingEu.title: Your data stays in Europe
hostingEu.body: Your menu content (dishes, allergens, photos) is stored with Supabase, in data centres located in France and Germany.

stripe.title: Payments handled by Stripe
stripe.body: When you upgrade to STARTER or PRO, Stripe processes the payment directly. Cartora never sees or stores your card number.

rgpd.title: You stay in control of your data
rgpd.body: Export, account deletion and cancellation are all available from your account, in one click. Compliant with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

noCc.q: Do I need a credit card to sign up?
noCc.a: No. You create your account and build your menu entirely for free, without a credit card. You only pay if you decide to publish your menu (from €9.90/month).

commitment.q: Am I locked into a contract?
commitment.a: No commitment period. STARTER and PRO subscriptions are monthly and can be cancelled with one click from your account, at any time.

qrAgeingClients.q: Will my customers know how to scan a QR code?
qrAgeingClients.a: Yes. QR codes became standard in restaurants after 2020 and most smartphones scan them directly from the camera app. If a customer can't scan, your menu URL also works without a QR.

allergens.a: The 14 allergens listed in EU regulation 1169/2011 are built in. You tick the ones present in each dish, and your customers see them right on the menu. Fully compliant with the legal disclosure requirement.

bilingual.q: Can I offer my menu in French and English?
bilingual.a: Yes, bilingual FR/EN is native. You enter each dish in both languages, and your customers automatically see theirs based on their browser settings.

dataHosting.q: Where is my restaurant's data stored?
dataHosting.a: On Supabase, in France and Germany — exclusively within the European Union. Your data never leaves the EU. You can export or delete it at any time from your account.

cancel.a: From your account, in one click. Cancellation is immediate, with no fee and no justification required. You keep free-tier access afterwards.

supportFr.a: Yes. Cartora is built in France, and every request sent to contact@cartora.app gets a reply in French within 48 business hours.

multiRestaurants.q: Can I manage multiple restaurants with one account?
multiRestaurants.a: Not yet — one account is one restaurant. If you manage several, write to us at contact@cartora.app; we review each case.

qrPrinting.q: How do I print the QR code and where should I place it?
qrPrinting.a: Cartora generates a high-resolution QR code downloadable from your dashboard. Print it on whatever you like: table mats, easels, window displays, receipts. Every printed copy always points to the latest version of your menu.

finalCta.title: Ready to digitize your menu?
finalCta.microTrust: No credit card · 10-minute setup · Cancel anytime

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.dataDescription: Manage your personal data and preferences.
Settings.dangerZoneDescription: Account deletion is immediate and irreversible.
Settings.appearanceDescription: Choose how your public menu is rendered.

branding.title: Visual identity
branding.description: Upload your logo. It will appear at the top of your public menu.
branding.logoDescription: JPG, PNG or WebP — 2 MB max. Square or rectangular format.
branding.freeNotice: Your logo will be visible on your menu once published — upgrading to the Starter plan is required to publish.

errors.wrongFormat: Unsupported format. Use JPG, PNG or WebP.

colors.title: Menu colors
colors.description: Choose the colors applied to your public menu (Classic template).
colors.classicOnly: Color customization is only available with the Classic template. Select "Classic" above to edit them.

colors.advancedHint: Pick each color freely. Check contrast before saving.
colors.saved: Colors saved. Republish your menu to apply them.
colors.contrastWarning: Insufficient contrast between the primary color and the background — text may be unreadable (WCAG AA not met).

template.title: Menu appearance
template.description: Choose the visual rendering of your public menu. Premium templates (Bistro, Noir, Solar, Zen, Neon) require the PRO plan.
template.saveSuccess: Template updated. Republish your menu to apply it.

descriptions.CLASSIC: Clean and readable, suits any kind of menu.
descriptions.CARTORA: Warm house style: sand, teal, fir green.
descriptions.NOIR: Fine dining: deep charcoal, champagne accents.
descriptions.SOLAR: Vibrant fast-casual: saturated coral and amber.
descriptions.NEON: Late-night bar: night background, cyan and magenta neon.

controller.title: Data controller
controller.body: Cartora is published by Cartora. For any questions about your personal data, contact us at contact@cartora.app.

account.title: Account data
account.body: When you sign up, we collect your email address and a password (stored as a hash). This data is required to create and manage your account.

menu.title: Menu data
menu.body: Restaurant name, menu items (names, descriptions, prices), translations. This is the content you create through the service.

payment.title: Payment data
payment.body: Your email is shared with Stripe during subscription. Stripe processes payment data (credit card) as a subprocessor. We do not store any banking information.

analytics.title: Audience data (with consent)
analytics.body: On public menu pages, and only with your consent, we collect: device type (inferred from User-Agent, not stored), browser language, and visit source (QR code, direct link). IP addresses are not stored.

technical.title: Technical data (with consent)
technical.body: With your consent, Sentry collects JavaScript errors and their technical context (URL, browser) to improve service stability. We have disabled the sending of personally identifiable information (sendDefaultPii: false).

purposes.title: Purposes of processing
purposes.service: Service delivery: account creation, menu management, publication, QR code
purposes.payment: Payment and subscription management via Stripe
purposes.analytics: Anonymized audience measurement on public menus (with consent)
purposes.security: Security: rate limiting to prevent abuse (temporary IP, not stored)
purposes.monitoring: Technical error monitoring via Sentry (with consent on the browser side)

contract.label: Contract (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR):
contract.body: registration, menu management, payment, publication, QR code.

consent.label: Consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR):
consent.body: visitor analytics, browser-side Sentry. You can withdraw your consent at any time via the "Manage cookies" button.

recipients.title: Recipients and subprocessors
recipients.intro: Your data is shared with the following subprocessors, strictly for the purposes described above:

retention.title: Retention periods
retention.account: Account data: lifetime of the account. Deleted in cascade when the account is deleted.
retention.analytics: Raw analytics events: 30 days (automatic daily purge)
retention.logs: Server logs (Vercel): per Vercel's retention policy (1 to 30 days depending on plan)

cookies.title: Cookies and trackers

session.label: Session cookies (Supabase Auth)
session.body: Essential for authentication. Exempt from consent.

locale.label: Language preference cookie (locale)
locale.body: Functional, stores your language choice (fr/en). Exempt from consent.

consent.label: Consent cookie (cartora-consent)
consent.body: Stores your acceptance or refusal of trackers. Duration: 13 months.

cookies.trackers: Non-essential trackers (analytics, browser-side Sentry) are only activated after your explicit consent.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.intro: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights:
rights.access: Right of access: obtain a copy of your personal data
rights.rectification: Right to rectification: correct inaccurate data
rights.erasure: Right to erasure: delete your account and all your data
rights.portability: Right to data portability: download your data in a structured format (JSON)
rights.withdrawConsent: Right to withdraw your consent to trackers at any time
rights.contact: To exercise your rights, contact us at contact@cartora.app. We will respond within one month.
rights.cnil: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the CNIL (www.cnil.fr).

transfers.title: Transfers outside the EU
transfers.body: Some of our subprocessors (Stripe, Vercel) are US companies. Data transfers to the United States are governed by the Data Privacy Framework (DPF) and/or Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs). We prioritize EU hosting when possible (Supabase EU, Sentry EU).

security.title: Security
security.body: We implement technical and organizational measures to protect your data: encryption in transit (HTTPS/TLS), hashed passwords, Row Level Security (RLS) at the database level, strict security headers (CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options).

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We reserve the right to update this policy. In case of a substantial change, we will notify you by email or through an in-app notification.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For any questions about this policy or your personal data: contact@cartora.app

publisher.title: Publisher
publisher.body: Cartora is published by Cartora. Email: contact@cartora.app

hosting.title: Hosting
hosting.body: The website is hosted by Vercel Inc., 440 N Barranca Ave #4133, Covina, CA 91723, United States. Website: vercel.com

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For any questions, you can reach us at contact@cartora.app.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual property
intellectualProperty.body: All content on the Cartora website (text, graphics, logo, icons, source code) is protected by copyright. Any reproduction, representation or distribution, in whole or in part, without prior authorization is prohibited.

object.title: Purpose
object.body: These terms govern the use of the Cartora service, a platform enabling restaurant owners to create and publish digital menus accessible via QR code.

access.title: Access to the service
access.body: The service is restricted to persons aged 18 or older. By creating an account, you confirm that you are of legal age and have the legal capacity to enter into a contract.

account.title: User account
account.body: Each user can create a single account linked to one restaurant and one menu. You are responsible for keeping your login credentials confidential.

service.title: Service description
service.body: Cartora lets you create a digital menu, publish it online, and generate a QR code to share it. The free plan includes menu creation with a watermark. The Pro plan allows publishing without watermark and access to the QR code.

pricing.title: Pricing and payment
pricing.body: The Pro plan is billed monthly. Payments are processed by Stripe. The subscription can be canceled at any time from the billing portal. In case of non-payment, access to Pro features is suspended.

obligations.title: User obligations
obligations.body: You agree to use the service for its intended purpose (creating restaurant menus) and not to publish unlawful, defamatory content or content that infringes the rights of third parties.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual property
intellectualProperty.body: You retain ownership of the content you publish on Cartora (dish names, descriptions, prices). Cartora retains ownership of the platform, source code, design and brand.

liability.title: Liability
liability.body: Cartora strives to ensure service availability but does not guarantee uninterrupted operation. Cartora shall not be held liable for indirect damages related to the use of the service.

termination.title: Termination and deletion
termination.body: You can delete your account at any time from settings. Deletion is immediate and irreversible: all your data, menu and subscription are deleted. Cartora reserves the right to suspend or delete an account in case of violation of these terms.

law.title: Applicable law
law.body: These terms are governed by French law. Any dispute shall be submitted to the competent courts.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For any questions about these terms: contact@cartora.app

Consent.bannerDescription: We use trackers to analyze traffic and improve service stability. See our <privacyLink>privacy policy</privacyLink>.
